---
description: "Markdown formatting rules matching Prettier config"
applyTo: "**/*.md"
---

# Markdown Formatting

- Max line width 100 characters (except code/URLs/tables).
- Tables: aligned columns with padding.
- Blank lines around lists, headings, code blocks.
- Use `-` for unordered lists. ATX headings (`#`). Code blocks with language identifier.
- **Bold** with `**text**`, _italic_ with `*text*`, inline `code` with backticks.
